title: What Bryan Was Working On Last from the album Afterlife
lyrics: I see it in your eyes, I see it in your ears Since we're gonna be not in the place we should Is it regret or is it what we should do to just stop and breathe? Are we coming down or are we trying to be founded? That illuminates around me, yeah, illuminated, not here Are we united? Are you united? Cause everything goes, everything goes Broken promises are never kept, I'm just trying to be there When the moon continues, shining oh so bright Lighting up the darkness, bask in the afterglow When you know that you've lost, and it's just there Watching all of the blood on the walls, you're basking in the afterglow What you gonna do, what you gonna be? Some people will tell you when you're small, you'll see that Don't think too much about that, roll your life in round 9 Don't roll in your dread, don't roll in your crime Don't be like benign, be free at all times Be cautious to the ones that take you away from you When the moon is shining, light me up in that dark I need you to bask in the afterglow When the thing is just, it's pulling you apart There's nowhere to turn, you're just basking in the afterglow When all the lines go from me to you, and you to them I say go on past it Every time you think of me inside you When the show is just, it gets dark and it's More than you can ever picture, bask in the afterglow And your heart is just, something's settled there It's not what you wanted, but it's what you needed Know that's afterglow inside it, the afterglow beyond it Silver lining guides your heart to start a fire of thunder If you're not dead, you're still here baby You're roaming in the afterglow Afterglow, that's right, me and you, together, dude, chick That's how we roll That's how we roll I got it, I'm telling you that Don't lose hope, kitty cat And you may have our space bar And another R

Since we're gonna be not in the place we should
Is it regret or is it what we should do to just stop and breathe?
Are we coming down or are we trying to be founded?
That illuminates around me, yeah, illuminated, not here
Are we united? Are you united?
Cause everything goes, everything goes
Broken promises are never kept, I'm just trying to be there
When the moon continues, shining oh so bright
Lighting up the darkness, bask in the afterglow
When you know that you've lost, and it's just there
Watching all of the blood on the walls, you're basking in the afterglow
What you gonna do, what you gonna be?
Some people will tell you when you're small, you'll see that
Don't think too much about that, roll your life in round 9
Don't roll in your dread, don't roll in your crime
Don't be like benign, be free at all times
Be cautious to the ones that take you away from you
When the moon is shining, light me up in that dark
I need you to bask in the afterglow
When the thing is just, it's pulling you apart

When all the lines go from me to you, and you to them
I say go on past it
Every time you think of me inside you
When the show is just, it gets dark and it's
More than you can ever picture, bask in the afterglow
And your heart is just, something's settled there
It's not what you wanted, but it's what you needed
Know that's afterglow inside it, the afterglow beyond it
Silver lining guides your heart to start a fire of thunder
If you're not dead, you're still here baby
You're roaming in the afterglow
Afterglow, that's right, me and you, together, dude, chick
That's how we roll
That's how we roll
I got it, I'm telling you that
